creator: ale_sagra@hotmail.com
text:
hi @ygy,
I see you committed https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=263097, would you mind doing the same with this?

This package has a hard dependency on py-oci package version, so if py-oci is updated, this should also be updated at the same time.

Rebuilding oci-cli 3.7.0 against new py-oci version fails with attached log.
Thank you
